div.h2: Why Text and Data Must Be Separate Segments

div.p: "Write XOR Execute" Memory cannot be both writable and executable.

ul.li: Hardware NX bit in page tables

div.h3: Key Insight: Segments Map to mmap() Protections
div.p: The p_flags field in each PT_LOAD header directly determines the prot argument:

p.strong: Hardened systems reject segments with PF_W | PF_X.

div.p: Contains: .text, .rodata, .eh_frame Permissions: PF_R | PF_X Mapped: Read + Execute
Contains: .data, .bss Permissions: PF_R | PF_W Mapped: Read + Write
